titleStmt.title: SII 38.222: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 222. (A.R. No. 222 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east, north and west bases of the Naṭarāja shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning of the line is built in. The available portion begins with kuñjara = kkuḻām of the king's mēykīrtti, Tirumaṉṉu viḷaṅgum irukuvaḷaṉaiyadaṉ.

It registers a sale of two vēli of land as iṟai-ili dēvadāna by the peruṅkuṟimahāsabhās of Sundarachōḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and Vāṉavanmādēvichaturvēdimaṅgalam of Puḻal-nāḍu to the temple in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam after receiving both the price-money and capital against taxes, from the temple treasury.

It appears that the yield of this land was intended to contribute for the provision of food offerings to the deity when the deity was pleased come down to the maṇḍapa on the occasion of tiruvēṭṭai (royal hunt festival) in the puraṭṭādi month, for the honouring of the god and consort with headgear (tiruppariśaṭṭam) and for feeding the attending devotees and other mendicants.
Udaiyādittan kṛamavittaṉ of Veṟpuṟam drafted this agreement at the behest of Gaṇavadi kṛamavittaṉ of Veṟpuram, Marāṭṭam Paḷḷichchīriḷaṅgō kṛamavittaṉ, and Kummaṇḍali Udayāditta kṛamavittaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kuñcarakkuḻām ruḷi Arukkaṉ Utayattāceyilirukkum kamalameṉaiya nilamakamuṉṉīr kuḷitta vaṉṉāṭṭirumālāti keḻalākiyaṉṟeṭut teruyātum caliyā vakaiyini teṭuttu taṉkuṭai niḻaliṉpuṟa virutti tikiriyum m naṭātti viramum tarumamum mānamum karuṇaiyum Urimai cuṟṟamākappiriyāta tarātalan nikaḻ cayamum tānum viṟṟiruntu kulamaṇimakuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟc cūṭi taṉkaḻal tarātipar cūṭac ceṅkol nāvalap puvitoṟunaṭātti virasiṁhāsanattup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruṉtaruḷiya korājakesari vanmarāna Uṭaiyār rājen=tiracoḻa�
p puḻal nāṭṭu cun=taracoḻacatuppetimaṅkalattum vānavaṉ māteviccatuppetimaṅkalattum peruṅkuṟimahāsabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇa kaiyeḻuttu Ikkoṭṭattu Innāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur piṭākai cekkāṭṭuril tiruoṟṟiyūrvatikku kiḻakku parān=takavāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcaturattu nāṅkaḷ munpu viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku meṟku Oruveliyum muṉṟāñ caturattuṭane meṟkaṭaiya nilam Oruveliyum Āka patiṉāṟ cāṇkolāl Iraṇṭuveliyum Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷ Iṟaikrayamum Ittevar śrī bhaṇṭārattile Aṟakkoṇṭu Iṟaiyili tevatānamāka Iṉṉilam Uvarumā
kkiya kiṇaṟumiṭṭuk koḷḷak kaṭavitākavum nila kicain=ta vaṇṇam nirpāyappeṟuvatākavum viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉṉilaṅ koṇṭu puraṭṭātimāsattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṭṭai Eḻun=taruḷina nāḷ Immaṇṭalattil Eḻun=taruḷiiru[ ntu] Amutu ceytaruḷavum Uṭaiyāṟku Oru tirupparicaṭṭamum pirāṭṭiyāṟku Oru tirupparicaṭṭamum cārttuvikkakaṭavitākavum Uṭaṉcevittuvan=ta śrī māheśvararaiyum śivayogikaḷaiyum Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavitākavum Ippaṭi candrādittavarai celuttak kaṭavitākavum sampadittup poruḷaṟak koṇṭaruḷi vilaiyaṟaviṟṟukkuṭuttom peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom sabhaiyuḷḷiruntu paṇiccār veṟpurattu kaṇavati kramavittaṉ paṇiyālum marāṭṭam paḷḷicciriḷaṅkokramavittan paṇiyālu kumuṇṭaliuṭaiyātitta kramavittan paṇiyālum Ivai veṟpuṟattu kan=tayakramavittaṉ makaṉ Utaiyātitta kramavittaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.222 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
